summary: P2 Export Functionality Testing Complete: All 6 backend export endpoints (Evaluaciones, Técnicos Aplicadores, Maquinaria - Excel and PDF) return HTTP 200 with correct file types. All 6 frontend export buttons are present and visible on their respective pages.
